scripts.supabase:functions:deploy: bash -lc 'set -e; if [ -d supabase/functions ] && find supabase/functions -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -type d | grep -q .; then for fn in $(find supabase/functions -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -type d -printf "%f\n"); do echo "Deploying function: $fn"; npx supabase functions deploy "$fn"; done; else echo "No Edge Functions found in supabase/functions, skipping deploy."; fi'
scripts.supabase:deploy: npm run supabase:link && npm run supabase:db:push && npm run supabase:functions:deploy
